parameters.query:
SELECT 
  op.id as orden_pago_uuid,
  op.order_id,
  op.monto,
  op.monto_bs,
  o.status as order_status,
  o.customer_id,
  c.phone as customer_phone,
  c.name as customer_name
FROM marketplace.ordenes_pago op
JOIN marketplace.orders o ON op.order_id = o.id
JOIN marketplace.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE op.id = '{{ $json.orden_pago_uuid }}'

SELECT 
  product_name,
  quantity,
  unit_price,
  total_bs
FROM marketplace.order_items
WHERE order_id = {{ $json.order_id }}

nodes.name: Validate BDV Payment
nodes.notes: Valida el pago contra la API de BDV

parameters.messageText:
=✅ ¡Pago confirmado! Tu pedido #{{ $json.order_id }} está siendo preparado.🎉

Gracias por tu compra, {{ $json.customer_name }}!

parameters.query:
UPDATE marketplace.ordenes_pago
SET status = 'paid',
    bdv_response = jsonb_build_object('confirmed_at', NOW(), 'code', 1000),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.orden_pago_uuid }}'

UPDATE marketplace.orders
SET status = 'paid',
    payment_reference = '{{ $json.orden_pago_uuid }}',
    payment_date = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.order_id }}
